name: flockos
description: Ministry Operating System — Free. Offline-capable. Built for every church.

scripts.build:www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -R FlockOS www/FlockOS && cp index.html manifest.json the_living_water.js www/ && cp -R FlockOS/Images www/FlockOS/Images
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
